summary: Iteration 73: Tested ratings moderation enhancements (Queue tab, Audit Log tab, Export) and SubscribeButton on 5 service detail pages. All 23 backend tests passed. Frontend Ratings page tabs verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: SubscribeButton integration on 5 service pages verified via code review - all imports and usages correct
Ratings page 4-tab layout (All Ratings, Queue, Audit Log, Reports) verified working via UI testing
Moderation Queue shows flagged items with Approve/Hide/Delete actions
Audit Log shows moderation history with actor names and timestamps

success_rate.frontend: 100% (4 tabs verified, Queue and Audit Log working)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data - 1 flagged rating, 10 moderation audit entries
context_for_next_testing_agent: All ratings moderation features working. SubscribeButton code is integrated in CarRentalDetails, CinemaFilmDetails, RestaurantDetails, TravelBooking, PackageBooking pages. The button only shows for customer users (not admin/operator). Service detail pages require valid data in DB to fully test SubscribeButton rendering.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/ratings/moderation-queue: Working - returns flagged/hidden items with counts
backend_endpoints.GET /api/ratings/export: Working - returns exportable JSON with all ratings

frontend_ui.4_tabs_layout: Verified - All Ratings, Queue, Audit Log, Reports tabs visible
frontend_ui.moderation_queue_tab: Working - shows 1 Flagged, 0 Hidden, 0 Low Rating with Approve/Hide/Delete buttons
frontend_ui.audit_log_tab: Working - shows 10 moderation actions with actor names and timestamps
